title: Photoreal Green Chess Pawn (Studio)
purpose: Render a single photorealistic green glossy chess pawn under soft studio lighting from a lathed surface-of-revolution OBJ.
prompt: Visualise a photorealistic green chess pawn under studio lights.
preview_note: octane-preview.png is the native Octane render. Usable convergence is reached by ~30s; raise samples for a clean final.
quality_checklist: Preview is non-blank and the pawn silhouette is upright and centered.
Pawn is clearly GREEN (material is bound; not the default white/grey).
Studio lighting shows soft highlights and a clean reflective floor.
Camera frames the full pawn with margin.

review_focus: task-specific labels, legends, or focal details
required_evidence: bridge result metadata for queued commands
native Octane candidate preview at octane-preview.png
glm-ocr reference and candidate review notes
one bounded patch plan per iteration
final native Octane render bundled as octane-preview.png
stop_conditions: candidate content and major silhouettes match the reference or stated recipe intent
camera/framing and lighting are close enough for the task
remaining gaps require bridge schema or native material capability work

baseline_sweep.purpose: Rapidly disambiguate scene orientation/camera framing before fine visual matching.

final_bundle.result_metadata_pattern: workspace/results/<command_id>.json copied or summarized into iterations/
final_bundle.note: The final iterated native Octane render and all reproduction assets should be checked in with this recipe before marking native_octane_verified true.
